body_html:
FYI

Sent from my iPhone

Begin forwarded message:

From: "Marie-Joseph Experton" <mjexperton@cabinet-experton.com>
Date: November 23, 2007 12:57:46 PM EST
To: <DKIESQ@aol.com>, "'Lauren Kwintner'" <lkwintner@nysgmail.com>
Subject: EPSTEIN / 5th floor room
Reply-To: <mjexperton@cabinet-experton.com>

 

Further to our last telephone conversation with respect to works and repairs to be done in the 5th-floor room:

 

1.

The meeting scheduled in Paris could not be held due to the multiple strikes in France last week and this week. A new appointment is re-scheduled with the plumber and HELLIER DU VERNEUIL on Tuesday November 27th at 2:30 pm.

 

2.

Change of windows and of the door is handled by Valdson, who has already made all arrangements for their installation.

 

3.

With respect to the installation of the air-conditioning, I obtained last week from MOLYNEUX, a copy of the request they filed with HELLIER DU VERNEUIL and the answer they got, which needed to be accepted by Mr. Epstein before the end of October. I attached to this mail HELLIER DU VERNEUIL’s answer with a draft English translation thereof.

 

NB: The air conditioning system selected by MOLYNEUX requires to have a few tiles removed from the roof, which technically affects the outside appearance of the building. This should (technically and in theory) be subject to a filing with the local authorities.  I contacted MOLYNEUX on this issue to explain this to them and after discussion, I was told that they are going to reconsider the type of system to be installed. Consequently, MOLYNEUX considers that a new request for authorization from HELLIER DU VERNEUIL will have to be filed.

 

After the meeting on Tuesday, I will make a complete report on the repairs still to be made in the room.

 

Best regards.

 

Marie-Joseph Experton

Avocat au Barreau de Paris établi à Bruxelles

Avenue Louise 65 (boîte 11)

1050 Bruxelles

Tél. +32 2 538 58 80

Fax +32 2 538 58 88

GSM +32 474 95 00 73

 

 

From: Daniel Perdreau [mailto:daniel@molyneuxstudio.fr]
Sent: jeudi 15 novembre 2007 18:18
To: mjexperton@cabinet-experton.com
Subject: TR: lettre Hellier du Verneuil

 

Cher Maître,

 

Je vous prie de bien vouloir trouver ci-joint la lettre du syndic.

Vous en souhaitant bonne réception, je vous prie de croire, Cher Maître, en l’assurance de ma considération distinguée.

 

Daniel Perdreau.

 

 

Daniel Perdreau

Secretaire General

JP Molyneux Studio Ltd

T : 01.49.96.63.30

F : 01.44.59.39.44

@ : daniel@molyneuxstudio.fr
